'''Cridark II''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Cridark system/Legends|Cridark system]]. It was part of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] and the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Denno Yanglan]].

{{Planet-stub}}
